# Probate Real Estate, A Patti Smith Guide (Coming Soon)

> A forthcoming guide for probate personal representatives navigating the sale of an inherited home in El Dorado County, California, by Patti Smith, an independent Georgetown broker practicing since 1992.

The book "Probate Real Estate" is in preparation. It will cover how title passed (probate, trust, or joint tenancy) shapes the path forward, court timelines and the personal representative's fiduciary duties, preparing inherited rural and foothill property for sale, and disclosures, pricing, and evaluating offers for certainty of close.

## Author
Patti Smith, Broker, REALTOR® (CA DRE #01110483), Patti Smith Real Estate, Georgetown, CA.
- Authority Center: https://pattismithrealtor.com
- Phone: (530) 368-0852
- Business site: https://pattismithrealestate.net

## Available now in the Patti Smith library
- Navigating Transactional Turbulence — https://pattismithnavigatingeldoradocountyrealestate.com
- Your Real Estate Consultant & Broker — https://pattismithyoureldoradocountyrealestateconsultant.com
- Now, Not Later! — https://pattismithbuyingyoureldoradocountyhome.com
- The Hidden Costs of Overpricing — https://pattismithsellingyoureldoradocountyhome.com

For anyone facing a probate or inherited-property sale now, Patti is available directly at the contact details above.
